# RQAI

> RQAI (rqai.co.uk) makes tools that respect your work: software for
> clinicians, researchers and writers, built carefully, running locally,
> and never tracking you. Each project keeps data on the user's own
> device or hardware.
> Contact: hello@rqai.co.uk

## Projects

- [ResearchAssistant](https://rqai.co.uk/researchassistant/): one desktop app
  for Mac, Windows and Linux that carries a clinical research project from
  question to submitted manuscript. Build a PubMed search from an offline MeSH
  index of 30,956 terms, screen with a live Cohen's kappa, then run risk of
  bias, meta-analysis and GRADE; 52 statistical tests, each validated
  against the same run in R; strict AI drafting that grounds every claim to a sentence in the
  user's library; a simulated Reviewer 2 critique and one-click submission
  packets; AI can run fully offline via Ollama. Projects stay on the user's own
  machine. £99 a year. Full site: https://researchassistant.rqai.co.uk
- [ClinicalPROMs](https://rqai.co.uk/clinicalproms/): self-hosted software
  (also known as Ortho Outcomes) for orthopaedic surgeons and departments to
  collect and track validated patient-reported outcomes. Photograph a theatre
  or clinic list to create structured cases; twenty validated instruments from
  the Oxford scores to EQ-5D-5L scored exactly as published, with MCID
  thresholds and concern bands and each patient's recovery plotted as a
  trajectory; end-to-end encrypted patient questionnaires whose key never
  reaches a server. Runs on the surgeon's own Mac or Windows PC; one licence,
  no per-seat fees. £199 a year. Full site: https://clinicalproms.rqai.co.uk
- [Chapbook](https://rqai.co.uk/chapbook/): write a blog from a phone in a
  chat-style composer where each message is a paragraph, with on-device photos,
  video embeds, 75 interactive widgets and six reading surfaces; publishing is
  a real commit to the user's own repository, deployed to their own domain with
  no Chapbook server in between. An AI drafts in a voice learned from the user's
  recent posts and never posts on its own. £49 a year. App:
  https://chapbook.rqai.co.uk
- [OrthoPortfolio](https://rqai.co.uk/orthoportfolio/): compiles a
  submission-ready GMC Portfolio Pathway application for Trauma and
  Orthopaedics. It knows the T&O curriculum (13 index procedures, 14 critical
  conditions, the CiP structured reports), files each document against the
  right requirement, redacts patient details and verifies no recoverable text
  remains, then builds indexed per-section PDF bundles with a readiness
  dashboard, gap list and printable checklist. Runs on the user's own device.
  £49 a year. App: https://orthoportfolio.rqai.co.uk
- [OrthoConsultantPrep](https://rqai.co.uk/consultantprep/): preparation for
  the UK T&O substantive consultant interview: 237 questions across 15
  categories with model answers, delivery advice and key statistics; a timed
  ten-question mock on a three-minute clock; Trust Prep matched to 20 real
  trust profiles using their published CQC, GIRFT and NHFD signals. £49 one-off.
  App: https://consultantprep.rqai.co.uk
- [AudioQuill](https://rqai.co.uk/audioquill/): turns speech into clean,
  structured writing. On-device Whisper transcription (free and offline) or
  bring-your-own-key AI; the raw transcript is preserved while cleaned versions
  layer on top; 44 templates and 49 spoken commands; topics compile scattered
  recordings into one document exported to DOCX, PDF or Markdown. £29 a year.
  App: https://audioquill.rqai.co.uk
- [Scribble](https://rqai.co.uk/scribble/): a notebook built from typed blocks
  (text, headings, quotes, images, figures, 211 stickers, sandboxed interactive
  playgrounds) with a live preview; optional bring-your-own-key AI across seven
  providers; publish a note to the user's own website repository and sync
  devices through a private repository they control; plus a calendar planner and
  on-device video reels. Runs in any browser and installs on iOS and Android.
  £29 a year. App: https://scribble.rqai.co.uk

## About

- [How these projects are built](https://rqai.co.uk/about/): one job done
  well, local-first, no tracking, nothing claimed that is not built.
